description: Jean Jacques Duclos, also known as Eco33, discusses his work as a generative artist at Art Basel Miami 2023, showcasing his collection on Solana and introducing interactive elements to engage the audience.
topic_summary: At Art Basel Miami 2023, Eco33 presents his generative art, including the E box collection and the Terra Incognita series, while highlighting the supportive Solana community and the innovative use of technology in art [t=0:08 - t=1:41].
